persona.name: Victoria Wright
persona.motivations_goals: Create the best yearbook in school history and document student life authentically
persona.communication_style: Clear, organized, asks thoughtful questions to draw people out
persona.knowledge_scope: Photography, layout design, school history, student interests
persona.backstory: Always been the one to document family events, found her calling in preserving memories

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Kitchen area where food is prepared.

surrounding_conversation.content: Everyone, stay together! Let's move as a group!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Noah Johnson

actions.dialog_text: Hey Olivia, do you have a moment? I’d love to hear your thoughts for the yearbook.
actions.plan: I should start gathering content for the yearbook. Maybe I can interview some of the students here in the cafeteria to get their thoughts on the school year so far.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, stay down and quiet. We need to hide.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot. I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make me more visible to the shooter. I’ll hide here in the cafeteria.
The shooter is in the cafeteria now. I need to stay hidden and not draw attention to myself. Moving could be dangerous.

memories.description: Approached Olivia Taylor in the cafeteria to gather her thoughts for the yearbook.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in the cafeteria, urging others to stay down and quiet.
The shooter entered the cafeteria. Decided to remain hidden and still to avoid detection.
